title: Denise's Haddock & Broccoli Casserole
description: A comforting baked haddock casserole layered over rice and broccoli with Muenster cheese and a buttery Ritz cracker crumb topping.
instructions: Cook the rice. Add rice and frozen broccoli to a 9x13 casserole dish. Lay cheese on top, then lay the fish on top. Lay the cracker crumb on top and pour over the melted butter.
Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes, removing the tin foil for the last 20 minutes or so.
